text.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: normal; fill: rgb(34, 36, 42);
text.tspan: End-to-end source-to-pay overview. Lanes are roles; Platform/System is automated. Happy path left-to-right; loops (over-budget, rejected) return to revise. Each labelled area expands into a per-domain diagram (02-12) and the edge cases (e01-e12). Foundation services (configurable approval
engine, field engine, FX, audit, notifications, SSE, bulk import, document storage, analytics, RBAC, budget/commitment, tax) underlie every step. SCOR-named spine; benchmark-traceable.
